mapper.sql: member_id, community_id, user_id, role, status, source, apply_time, approve_time, approved_by, join_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM community_members WHERE community_id = #{communityId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY join_time DESC
SELECT FROM community_members WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY join_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_members WHERE community_id = #{communityId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
